mark: Connected-node graph (orb) — 8–9 white nodes with edges, network/coordination motif

gradient.name: Sky-to-Sun
gradient.description: Top: cool slate-blue (sky). Mid: pale warm neutral with subtle pasture-yellow band. Bottom: warm amber (sun/earth).

typography_observed.wordmark_font_likely: Poppins or similar geometric sans (700 weight)
typography_observed.tagline_font_likely: Poppins or similar geometric sans (400 weight)

implications_for_design_md: Pivot from MASTERPLAN's dark-tech aesthetic (#172027 + mint accents) to a light-bioregional aesthetic.
Signature gradient is sky→sun — must be a first-class design element, not just background.
Primary action color: derive from sun-deep amber #d69f44 (oklch 74% 0.125 77) — needs paired accessible variants for AA contrast on light bg.
Cool slate-blue is the supporting/secondary hue, not the primary brand color.
Connected-node mark (orb) is the core visual identity — should appear consistently as nav mark, favicon, loading states.
